news.t: VistaShares' OMAH ETF Surpasses $500 Million in Assets Under Management
First Buffett, Now Ackman – VistaShares Adds to Lineup of ETFs Allowing Investors to Invest Like the Legends While Also Targeting High Monthly Income
The VistaShares Target 15™ Berkshire Select Income ETF (OMAH) Passes the $100 Million AUM Mark
Warren Buffett's top stock picks and Berkshire Hathaway come with 15% income bonus in this new fund
VistaShares Announces April 2025 Distribution for OMAH ETF
VistaShares Announces March 2025 Distribution for OMAH ETF
VistaShares Introduces the VistaShares Target 15™ Berkshire Select Income ETF

holdings.infoBox: OMAH is an equity ETF with a total of 83 individual holdings. The top holdings are Berkshire Hathaway stock at 10.04%, Apple at 6.82%, American Express Company at 5.61%, Bank of America at 4.96%, and Delta Air Lines at 4.84%.

overview.description: The VistaShares Target 15 Berkshire Select Income ETF (OMAH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively manages a narrow portfolio of securities selected from Berkshire Hathaway positions, while employing a covered call strategy. Index constituents primarily consist of US large-cap stocks OMAH was launched on Mar 5, 2025 and is issued by VistaShares.

data.title: VistaShares' OMAH ETF Surpasses $500 Million in Assets Under Management
data.text: NEW YORK & SAN FRANCISCO & BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VistaShares Target 15™ Berkshire Select Income ETF (OMAH) surpasses $500 million in AUM. Investors gravitate to its "Buffett + income" approach.
